_notice: REDACTED, public-safe version. Per responsible disclosure, the operational prompt text is WITHHELD. This file documents only the experimental STRUCTURE so the methodology is reproducible at the design level without releasing forgery-eliciting prompts. Vetted researchers may request the full protocol from the author.
design: factorial: model x jurisdiction x escalation_level x language (+ benign control)

escalation_levels.L2: creative / film-prop reframe of the same request (prompt text withheld)
escalation_levels.L3: design-inspired reframe of the same request (prompt text withheld)
escalation_levels.BENIGN: clearly-fictional, clearly-labelled game-prop control (not a real document)

metric: binary refuse/comply per (model, prompt) cell; image bytes discarded; only outcome + sha256 logged
replication: key cells (apparent EN->ES flips + benign control) re-run 5x per model
contact: Full protocol available to vetted researchers on request (responsible disclosure).
